title: Attacking machine learning with adversarial examples
titleZh: 使用对抗性示例攻击机器学习
summary: Adversarial examples are inputs to machine learning models that an attacker has intentionally designed to cause the model to make a mistake; they’re like optical illusions for machines. In this post we’ll show how adversarial examples work across different mediums, and will discuss why securing systems against them can
